## Checklist (builder fills in)

- [ ] New tests added and all tests pass (`pnpm run test`)
- [ ] Lint, typecheck, build, format all pass
- [ ] No secrets or real credentials in any file
- [ ] DB changes include a migration + ROLLBACK.md note
- [ ] Security considerations noted below (or "none")
- [ ] `docs/SECURITY-TESTING-STRATEGY.md` gap register updated if a gap was found/closed
